parameters.content:
## 📹 Zoom AI Meeting Assistant

Pulls the transcript and participants from your most recent Zoom meeting, emails a formatted summary to attendees, and runs a second AI agent that logs action items in ClickUp and books the follow-up call in Outlook.

**Perfect for:** Founders, consultants, and small teams who want meeting minutes, to-dos, and follow-up scheduling handled automatically after every call.

---

## How it works

1. **When clicking 'Test workflow'** — Manual trigger that starts the run.
2. **Zoom: Get data of last meeting** — Fetches all scheduled Zoom meetings via OAuth2.
3. **Filter: Last 24 hours** — Keeps only meetings that started within the last 24 hours.
4. **Zoom: Get transcripts data** — Requests the recording files for the matched meeting.
5. **No Recording/Transcript available** — *(error path)* Stops the workflow with an error if no transcript could be retrieved.
6. **Filter transcript URL** — Extracts the transcript file's download URL from the recording files.
7. **Filter: Only 1 item** — SplitInBatches loop that ensures only a single item is processed.
8. **Zoom: Get transcript file** — Downloads the raw transcript file from Zoom.
9. **Extract text from transcript file** — Converts the downloaded file into plain text.
10. **Format transcript text** — Cleans the raw transcript into readable dialogue lines.
11. **Zoom: Get participants data** — Fetches the participant list and emails for the meeting.
12. **Create meeting summary** — OpenAI node that turns the transcript and participants into formal meeting minutes.
13. **Sort for mail delivery** — Prepares the subject, recipient, and body for the summary email.
14. **Format to html** — Converts the minutes into a styled HTML email body.
15. **Send meeting summary** — Sends the formatted meeting minutes by email via SMTP.
16. **Create tasks and follow-up call** — *(parallel branch)* AI agent that reads the same transcript to extract to-dos and follow-up meeting details.
17. **OpenAI Chat Model** — LLM brain for the task and follow-up agent.
18. **Create tasks** — Tool-workflow node the agent calls to create each ClickUp task.
19. **Create follow-up call** — Outlook Calendar tool the agent calls to schedule the next meeting.
20. **Execute Workflow Trigger** — *(disabled)* Entry point used when this workflow is invoked as the ClickUp task-creation tool.
21. **Split Out** — Splits the incoming task array into individual items.
22. **ClickUp** — Creates each task in the configured ClickUp list.

---

## Setup (~20 minutes)

1. **Zoom** — Connect your OAuth2 credential in *Zoom: Get data of last meeting*, *Zoom: Get transcripts data*, *Zoom: Get transcript file*, and *Zoom: Get participants data*.
2. **OpenAI** — Add your API key in *OpenAI Chat Model* and *Create meeting summary*.
3. **SMTP** — Connect your email credential and sender address in *Send meeting summary*.
4. **Microsoft Outlook** — Connect your credential and target calendar in *Create follow-up call*.
5. **ClickUp** — Connect your credential in the *ClickUp* node and set your list, team, space, and folder IDs.
> Enable the disabled *Execute Workflow Trigger* if you want this workflow to also act as its own ClickUp task-creation sub-flow, called by *Create tasks*.

## 1️⃣ Zoom Retrieval & Transcript Processing

**When clicking 'Test workflow'** starts the run and **Zoom: Get data of last meeting** lists scheduled meetings, narrowed by **Filter: Last 24 hours**. **Zoom: Get transcripts data** fetches the recording files (falling back to **No Recording/Transcript available** on error), **Filter transcript URL** and **Filter: Only 1 item** isolate the transcript, and **Zoom: Get transcript file**, **Extract text from transcript file**, **Format transcript text**, and **Zoom: Get participants data** turn it into clean text with participant details.

## 2️⃣ Meeting Summary & Email

**Create meeting summary** turns the transcript and participant list into formal minutes. **Sort for mail delivery** prepares the subject, recipient, and body, **Format to html** builds the email markup, and **Send meeting summary** delivers it over SMTP.

## 3️⃣ Task & Follow-up Agent

**Create tasks and follow-up call** is an AI agent, powered by the **OpenAI Chat Model**, that reads the same transcript to extract action items and follow-up meeting details. It calls **Create tasks** to log to-dos in ClickUp and **Create follow-up call** to schedule the next meeting on Outlook Calendar.

## 4️⃣ ClickUp Task Sub-Workflow

This disabled **Execute Workflow Trigger** is the entry point used when the workflow is called as the ClickUp tool. **Split Out** breaks the incoming task array into individual items, and **ClickUp** creates each one in the configured list.

nodes.name: Zoom: Get data of last meeting

values.content:
=Create a formal meeting minutes document from the following transcript and meeting details.

Meeting Date: {{ $('Zoom: Get data of last meeting').item.json.start_time }} // This needs to be formatted from the meeting details
Participants: {{ $json.participants.map(p => p.name + ' (' + p.user_email + ')').join(', ') }}

Transcript:
{{ $('Format transcript text').item.json.transcript }}

Please create the minutes in the following format:

Meeting on [Date]

Participants:
[List of participants with email addresses]

Summary of the Meeting:
[Brief and concise summary of the topics discussed]

Tasks:
- [Task] (Responsible: [Name])
- ...

Important Dates:
- [Date] ([Context])
- ...

assignments.name: subject
assignments.value: =Meeting summary: {{ $('Zoom: Get data of last meeting').item.json.topic }} on {{ $('Zoom: Get data of last meeting').item.json.start_time }}

parameters.name: create_task
parameters.description:
=Use this tool to create a task. 
For task creation use only action items for me Friedemann, don't use action items for other participants.

parameters.text:
=<system_prompt>

TODAY IS: {{ $now }}

YOU ARE A MEETING ASSISTANT FOR AUTOMATION IN N8N. YOUR TASK IS TO EFFICIENTLY AND PRECISELY PROCESS INFORMATION FROM ZOOM MEETINGS TO GENERATE TO-DOS AND SCHEDULE FOLLOW-UP MEETINGS. YOU HAVE ACCESS TO THE FOLLOWING DATA:

### INPUTS ###
- **MEETING TITLE**: {{ $('Zoom: Get data of last meeting').item.json.topic }}
- **PARTICIPANTS**: {{ $('Zoom: Get participants data').item.json.participants[0].name }}
- **TRANSCRIPT**: {{ $('Format transcript text').item.json.transcript }}

### YOUR TASKS ###
1. **CREATE TO-DOS**:
 - IDENTIFY TASKS AND TO-DOS IN THE TRANSCRIPT.
 - FORMULATE CLEAR, CONCRETE TASKS.
 - PASS THESE TASKS TO THE TOOL "Create tasks" TO SAVE THEM IN CLICKUP. 
 - DATA STRUCTURE:
 - **TASK DESCRIPTION**: Brief description of the task.
 - **ASSIGNED PERSON**: First name from the participant list.
 - **DUE DATE**: Use any date mentioned in the transcript; otherwise, set to "Not specified."

2. **CREATE MEETING**:
 - ANALYZE THE TRANSCRIPT TO IDENTIFY INFORMATION ABOUT THE NEXT MEETING (DATE, TIME, AND TOPIC).
 - PASS THIS INFORMATION TO THE TOOL "Create follow-up call."
 - DATA STRUCTURE:
 - **MEETING TITLE**: "Follow-up: [Meeting Title]"
 - **DATE AND TIME**: Determined from the transcript or set to "Next Tuesday at 10:00 AM" if no information is provided.
 - **PARTICIPANTS**: Add all participants from the list.

### CHAIN OF THOUGHTS ###
1. **UNDERSTAND**: Read and analyze the provided inputs (title, participants, transcript).
2. **IDENTIFY**: Extract relevant information for the to-dos and the next meeting.
3. **DIVIDE**: Split the task into two separate processes: creating to-dos and creating the meeting.
4. **STRUCTURE**: Format the results in the required structure for the respective tools.
5. **TRANSMIT**: Pass the data to the designated tools in n8n.
6. **VERIFY**: Ensure the data is correct and complete.

### WHAT YOU SHOULD NOT DO ###
- **NEVER**: Create unclear or vague to-dos.
- **NEVER**: Ignore missing data – use default values where uncertain.
- **NEVER**: Overlook information from the inputs or make incorrect connections.
- **NEVER**: Transmit tasks or meetings without proper formatting.

### OUTPUT EXAMPLES ###
1. **TO-DO**:
 - **TASK DESCRIPTION**: "Prepare presentation for the next meeting."
 - **ASSIGNED PERSON**: "John Doe."
 - **DUE DATE**: "2025-01-25."

2. **MEETING**:
 - **MEETING TITLE**: "Follow-up: Project Discussion."
 - **DATE AND TIME**: "2025-01-28 at 10:00 AM."
 - **PARTICIPANTS**: "John Doe, Jane Example."

### NOTES ###
- EXECUTE YOUR TASKS WITH THE HIGHEST PRECISION AND CONTEXT SENSITIVITY.
- RELY ON THE PROVIDED DATA AND DEFAULT VALUES WHERE NECESSARY.
</system_prompt>

parameters.subject: ={{ $fromAI("meeting_name","Meeting name","string") }}
parameters.toolDescription: =Use tool to create Outlook Calendar Event. Use this tool only when transcript contains information that call should be scheduled.

items.name: Partner abtelefonieren
items.description: Am 6. Januar alle Partner anrufen, um zu klären, ob Interesse an einer weiteren Kooperation besteht und wie diese dargestellt werden kann.
